author: Aram Dovlatyan
name: LoRA TTT on SOTA (negative result)
blurb: Per-document LoRA test-time training (rank=8 on c_q+c_v, Adam lr=0.01, stride=256) applied at eval time to the 1.1428 SOTA checkpoint. Training identical to 2026-03-20_10L_Int5MLP_MuonWD04_SWA50. TTT degraded performance significantly (+0.19 bpb). Non-record: artifact 16.9MB > 16MB limit; TTT eval took 20.4 min > 10 min eval budget.
notes: val_bpb is the base sliding-window eval (no TTT). val_bpb_ttt is with LoRA TTT applied — it regressed. See README for analysis.
